quickSummary: Weekend edition with heavy volume — 12 new posts across 12 publications. The week's dominant narratives crystallized: software-vs-semis rotation produced a 6-sigma event (IGV outperformed SOX by 15%), oil posted its biggest weekly spike ever on Iran escalation, and NFP printed -92K. Insider buying accelerated into weakness — KKR cluster at $15.6M across 4 insiders. Deep dives on TWLO (18x fwd FCF, AI voice optionality), FIZZ (13.2x EV/EBIT, 40% ROE), and KITS.TO (downgraded on hidden BTC loss). Fear & Greed at 27 (Fear).

keyThemes.title: Software vs Semis: 6-Sigma Event
keyThemes.description: IGV outperformed SOX by 15% in one week — biggest spread in 15 years. Previous record was 8%. TMTB had called the rotation but violence exceeded expectations.

keyThemes.title: 3 Middle East Scenarios
keyThemes.description: Crack The Market: De-escalation (40%), Contained conflict (35%), Full escalation/Hormuz closure (25%). Recommends 15-20% cash, energy hedges.

keyThemes.title: AI Reshaping Work Structure
keyThemes.description: Nate: AI raised per-person output 10x ($300K to $2M/yr) but coordination costs unchanged. 6th team member destroys value. 'Scout vs strike team' framework.

keyThemes.title: Prompt Engineering Is Dead
keyThemes.description: VC Corner: Karpathy says replaced by 'context engineering.' Amodei says AGI closer than expected. Immerman: AI eats SaaS but expands total market.

keyThemes.title: TWLO: AI Voice Optionality
keyThemes.description: Stock Talk: 18x fwd FCF, share count down 20%, AI voice agent optionality in $100B+ call center market. 50% FCF to buybacks = $3B+ by 2030.

fearGreedIndex.label: Fear
fearGreedIndex.context: Unchanged at 27 (weekend). Down 19 points in two weeks (46 to 27), approaching Extreme Fear (25). Friday bounce +1.33% was relief rally, not reversal. 1 week ago: 38. 1 month ago: 46. 1 year ago: 17 (Extreme Fear).

stockHighlights.context: Stock Talk deep dive: 18x fwd FCF, AI voice agent optionality, share count -20%, 50% FCF to buybacks
Security Analysis: 13.2x EV/EBIT, 40% ROE, 12% D/E — quality consumer staples compounder
Software ETF outperformed SOX by 15% in one week — 6-sigma event, biggest spread in 15 years
Wolf downgraded: hidden $5M BTC ETF investment at $114K now -41%, potential $900K+ hit = half Q1 profit
Semis rotation: SOX -7.21% for week, violent rotation into software
Multibagger doubling down after -15% earnings selloff, views it as 'a gift'

high: IGV/SOX — 6-sigma spread, software vs semis rotation
moderate: TWLO — AI voice optionality deep dive

insiderBuysNote: Top 20 open-market purchases from SEC Form 4 filings (Feb 24 – Mar 7, 2026).
insiderBuysSignals: TTD CEO Jeff Green's $148M purchase (+373% position) remains the dominant signal. KKR cluster buy expanded to $15.6M across 4 insiders (both Co-CEOs + 2 directors). Sprott doubled down on HYMC ($8.8M total across 2 buys). NMFC's Klinsky made 3 purchases totaling ~$7.9M. SSP (E.W. Scripps) cluster buy from 2 insiders ($2.4M). Breadth of insider buying during a panic week is historically bullish.

macroOverview.author: Darius Dale
macroOverview.title: Stagflation risk intensifies as Hormuz closure meets labor market deterioration

themes.title: Software vs Semis Rotation
themes.description: 6-sigma event: IGV outperformed SOX by 15% in one week. Biggest weekly spread in 15 years. Previous record was 8%. MS TMT Conference amplified the dislocation.

themes.title: Energy Crisis
themes.description: Oil at $90, biggest weekly spike ever. Hormuz effectively closed. Largest energy supply disruption since Ukraine invasion.

themes.title: Labor Market
themes.description: NFP -92K jobs, unemployment 4.4%. Worst jobs report since 2021. Combined with oil = stagflationary setup.

themes.title: Dollar / Safe Haven
themes.description: USD sole safe haven. Gold declining despite shooting war. Capital wants 'dollars, and only dollars.'

themes.title: Insider Buying
themes.description: $350M+ in open-market purchases this week. TTD $148M, KKR $15.6M cluster. Historically bullish contrarian signal.

themes.title: AI Disruption
themes.description: Prompt engineering dead (Karpathy). AGI closer than expected (Amodei). AI eating SaaS but expanding total market (Immerman). Per-person output 10x (Nate).

posts.title: 3 Scenarios for the Middle East Crisis and What They Mean for Your Portfolio
posts.summary: De-escalation (40%), Contained conflict (35%), Full escalation/Hormuz closure (25%). Recommends 15-20% cash, energy hedges, avoid levered positions.

posts.title: The Dead Zone
posts.summary: Tim Price: Cronenberg parallels to current geopolitics. 2022 UK gilt crisis as case study for systemic risk. Gold and value investing remain correct positioning. Austrian-school macro.

posts.title: 52% Total Return Potential: Fortress Europe's €70M New Revenue Machine
posts.summary: Undisclosed European defense/industrial company with €70M new contracted revenue. 52% total return potential. NATO rearmament catalyst.

posts.title: TWLO - Future Buyback Champion & AI Winner at 18x Fwd FCF?
posts.summary: Bull case: 'Super-network' moat across 5,000 carriers. Share count -20%. AI voice agent optionality in $100B+ call center market. 50% FCF to buybacks = $3B+ by 2030. Customer count +24% to 402K.

posts.title: National Beverage Corp (FIZZ)
posts.summary: LaCroix parent: EV/EBIT 13.2x, ROE 40.72%, Debt/Equity 12%, FCF Yield 5.5%, Market Cap $3.34B. Quality consumer staples compounder.

posts.title: KITS Eyecare ($KITS.TO) FINS Review — Downgraded to 3/5
posts.summary: Revenue $200M+, 200bps margin improvement, debt extinguished. BUT: OCF -12%, marketing costs rising, hidden $5M BTC ETF investment at $114K now -41% = $900K+ hit (half Q1 profit).

posts.title: Portfolio Update #2
posts.summary: Largest position -15% on earnings. Author doubling down — views selloff as 'a gift.' Deploying cash into existing holdings, cutting one position, adding new name.

posts.title: TMTB Weekly
posts.summary: Software outperformed semis by 15% (6-sigma event) — biggest weekly spread in 15 years. IGV +7.85% vs SOX -7.21%. TMTB called the rotation but violence exceeded expectations.

posts.title: Use Claude to Understand Any Business 10x Faster
posts.summary: Practical guide: prompt frameworks for deconstructing business models from 10-Ks, building moat maps, identifying red flags, generating thesis summaries.

posts.title: Executive Briefing: When Each Person Produces $2M a Year...
posts.summary: AI raised per-person output 10x but coordination costs unchanged. n(n-1)/2 combinatorics: 6th team member destroys value. 'Scout vs strike team' framework. 'Steinberger Threshold.'

posts.title: AGI Is Closer Than You Think, Prompt Engineering Is Dead...
posts.summary: Karpathy: prompt engineering dead, replaced by 'context engineering.' Amodei: AGI sooner than expected. Immerman: AI eats SaaS but expands total market. New VC funds covered.

posts.title: Why Some People Succeed, Anthropic's AI Jobs Report, Socratic Prompting
posts.summary: Weekly roundup: success psychology, Anthropic's AI jobs report on workforce displacement, Socratic prompting for better AI outputs.
